title: Ship partner engineering acquisition surfaces and rollout-health content

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the partner-engineering landing page, partner-engineering comparison entry, rollout-health blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
